positive: A stylized, high-contrast illustration of a crescent moon embracing a group of minimalist forest animals—a deer, a fox, and a bear cub—all positioned in a comforting, harmonious circle. The style should be vintage botanical etching meets modern Nordic folk art, rendered with clean linework, deep indigo, moss green, and burnt sienna color palette. Focus on elegant silhouettes and visible texture contrast between the subjects and the ethereal background. Central composition, perfect for apparel print. Dramatic, soft rim lighting on the edges of the animals. Vector art, woodcut style, extremely detailed, 8k resolution.
negative: blur, noisy, text, watermark, signature, logo, copyright, bad anatomy, extra limbs, mutated, poor quality, low resolution, grainy, messy, cluttered background
